vision: Build the reference IDE extension for Documentation-Driven Development: a lightweight, agent-agnostic VSCode plugin that scaffolds and manages the `.ai_context/` folder, turning project documentation into the primary interface between developers and AI agents.

steps.name: Phase 1 — Core structure
steps.description: Init command, tree view, basic templates, dev-context.json, skills/, steps/

steps.name: Phase 2 — Context panel
steps.description: Webview sidebar showing vision, steps progress, active task and todos

task.title: Fix & stabilize New Task / New Vision commands
task.description: Migrate from context.json to dev-context.json, fix command registration, align ContextPanel with new data model

todos.text: Rename context.json → dev-context.json with enriched structure
Show steps with done/pending state in ContextPanel
Recompile and test New Task end-to-end
